summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Tron 'Tactical Futurism' UI redesign. All 17 features tested successfully - login page, login flow, dashboard, sidebar navigation, instance switcher, all admin pages (Analytics, Knowledge Base, Conversations, Bot Settings, Discord, Embed Code, Instances, Users), public pages (Chat, Register, Forgot Password), and logout functionality. Theme applied consistently across all pages.

flows_verified.login_page_tron_theme: PASS - Dark background (#030712), split screen with Tron grid image, cyan accents, BridgeBot branding
flows_verified.login_flow: PASS - admin@bridgebot.tech / Admin@123 successfully logs in and redirects to /admin
flows_verified.dashboard_page: PASS - Stat cards (Conversations, Total Messages, Knowledge Sources, Training Examples), Platform Breakdown, Quick Actions, Recent Conversations table with Tron theme
flows_verified.sidebar_navigation: PASS - All 9 nav items clickable and route correctly (Dashboard, Knowledge Base, Conversations, Bot Settings, Analytics, Discord, Embed Code, Instances, Users)
flows_verified.instance_switcher: PASS - Dropdown opens, shows 2 instances (test, Test Instance), selection works
flows_verified.analytics_page: PASS - Charts (Activity - Last 7 Days, Platform Split), Daily Breakdown table with Tron theme
flows_verified.knowledge_base_page: PASS - Tabs working (FAQ, URL Scraper, Upload Document), form fields styled correctly
flows_verified.conversations_page: PASS - Filter tabs (All, Web, Discord, Approved), conversation list with Tron theme
flows_verified.bot_settings_page: PASS - Identity section, Custom Instructions, Tone Training section with Tron theme
flows_verified.discord_settings_page: PASS - Setup Guide, Bot Status, Configuration, Listen Mode, Reply Style with Tron theme
flows_verified.embed_code_page: PASS - iframe code, JavaScript snippet, React component, live preview with Tron theme
flows_verified.instances_page: PASS - Admin-only, shows 2 instances with user counts, Tron theme applied
flows_verified.users_page: PASS - Admin-only, shows all users with roles, verification status, assigned instances
flows_verified.chat_page: PASS - BridgeBot Assistant header, ONLINE status, message input, Tron theme
flows_verified.register_page: PASS - Split screen with Tron grid image, form fields (Email, Password, Confirm Password)
flows_verified.forgot_password_page: PASS - Centered card, email input, Send Reset Code button, Tron theme
flows_verified.logout_functionality: PASS - Clicking logout button redirects to /login

theme_verification.colors: Deep navy backgrounds (#030712), cyan (#00F5FF) accents, royal blue (#0088FF) primary buttons
theme_verification.typography: Outfit headings, IBM Plex Sans body, JetBrains Mono for code/labels
theme_verification.components: Sharp 2px corners, consistent border colors, proper contrast
theme_verification.consistency: Theme applied uniformly across all 17+ pages

context_for_next_testing_agent: Full Tron UI redesign verified. All pages load correctly with consistent theming. Login credentials: admin@bridgebot.tech / Admin@123. Instance switcher has 2 instances (test, Test Instance). All navigation items work. No console errors observed during testing.
